overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in cowboy attire walking through a forest at night. The scene transitions from dense woodland to open grassland with visible power lines, culminating in a white horse galloping across the path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through dense forest with trees flanking both sides

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
low shrubs and ferns lining the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a densely wooded forest at night, with tall trees blocking most of the sky. The narrow dirt path winds through thick underbrush and vegetation on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with utility infrastructure

events.description: emerging from dense forest canopy into open grassland with visible power lines and utility poles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens up to reveal grassy hills and overhead power lines

entered.detail: overhead electrical wires stretching across the open sky
tall wooden electrical pole supporting the power lines
rolling grassy terrain with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into wide grassland with rolling hills. Wooden utility poles and power lines become visible against the night sky. The path remains a dirt trail but is now flanked by open grassy terrain rather than dense trees.

events.description: white horse suddenly gallops across the path from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along the open trail as a horse runs past from the left side

notable_agents.action: white horse galloping rapidly across the path from left to right

entered.detail: boulder or rock formation on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through open grassland with scattered trees. A white horse suddenly gallops across the path from left to right. The power lines and utility poles fade from view as the character progresses along the hillside trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit grassland. It begins on a narrow dirt path winding through thick underbrush and towering trees that obscure the night sky. As the character progresses, the dense woodland recedes to reveal rolling hills and open grassy terrain, where wooden utility poles and power lines emerge against the horizon. The scene then shifts further into the open landscape with scattered trees, just as a white horse suddenly gallops across the trail from left to right. Finally, the utility poles fade from view as the camera continues along the hillside path under the open sky.
